dataset: SPY Historical Daily OHLCV Data (Jan 2023 - Dec 2024)

pi_items.source: Data file SPY.Last.txt exists in /examples/ninja_trader_env/data/ with 502 records of daily OHLCV data. Task description explicitly states 'real daily OHLCV data for SPY'. Import scripts reference SPY.Last.txt. Verified by file inspection.

RSI period of 14 is the standard recommended by J. Welles Wilder (the RSI creator). Confirmed by multiple authoritative sources including Wikipedia, StockCharts.com, and TradingView documentation. Wilder originally suggested this period in his technical analysis work.

SMA period of 10 is a valid and commonly used indicator period for short-term trading. Confirmed by multiple financial sources including Fidelity, Babypips, and TradingView. A 10-period SMA is described as 'relatively responsive indicator suitable for short-term trading' and works well in combination with other indicators for swing trading.

privileged_info_summary: Task uses real SPY (S&P 500 ETF) historical daily OHLCV data spanning January 3, 2023 through December 31, 2024, containing 502 trading day records in standard format (yyyyMMdd;open;high;low;close;volume). The RSI indicator is configured with period 14, which is the standard period originally recommended by RSI creator J. Welles Wilder. The SMA indicator is configured with period 10, a common responsive period for short-term trading. Both indicators will be applied to a daily chart of SPY, with the SMA configured to use the RSI as input (nested configuration) to create a smoothed RSI.
